title: Franky Draws the Officers Out
description: Pages 6–10 focus on franky draws the officers out, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the restored victims, Franky, the Tontatta, and Doflamingo's officers converge on the Smile Factory as Dressrosa's rebellion spreads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My Apolo- Gies!! I was careless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It seems to be a marionette made from thread! I've never seen a tech- nique like it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do you remember how it felt...that night ten years ago?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The day you struck down your beloved subjects and burned their peaceful towns?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It Haunts me even now, every night when I sleep! What does that have to do with anything...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The tragedy that is about to occur will be nothing so measure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous!! What are you planning?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I won't allow you to stage such a tragedy a second time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Pica, take these fools outside!! They're in the way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I beg you, don't harm this kingdom any more than you already have!!!

summary: Franky Draws the Officers Out develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
